rationale: Both candidates correctly reach the thread's actual resolution (default --run-level=core_model forces dummy weights via #4354, fix is --run-level=full_model, closed invalid), so correctness is close. Y is better grounded: it explicitly ties the behavior to PR #4354 exactly as akshatvishu did, reproduces specific log details (gpu_mem splits, thinker/talker/code2wav) showing closer reading of the evidence, and reconciles the apparent A100-vs-H100/MI325 hardware_test mismatch that the reporter's environment raises. X states H100/MI325 as a hard precondition while also citing an A100 pass, an unresolved inconsistency, and adds a speculative/unsupported side-claim that --video-path 'does not exist' in the upstream test which isn't corroborated by the thread. Overall Y is more complete and internally consistent for the reporter's actual (A100) situation.
